name: Guild Skills Eval Suite
description: Evaluation test cases for all Guild skills. Each skill has at least 2 test cases with objectively verifiable assertions.
pattern_syntax: All pattern fields use regex syntax (e.g., | for alternation, .* for wildcards). Runners must treat patterns as regular expressions.
fixture_note: Prompts referencing specific issue/PR numbers (e.g., #N) assume a seeded test repository. Replace <ISSUE_N> and <PR_N> placeholders with actual IDs from the test fixture before running.

tests.name: scout-posts-issues-with-correct-format
tests.prompt: Scout this repository for bugs and improvement opportunities. Focus on code quality.

assertions.description: Must create at least one GitHub issue
Must label created issues with agent:proposed
Rangers must NOT implement fixes or commit code

tests.name: scout-respects-existing-issues
tests.prompt: Scout this repository for issues. There are already open issues on the board — avoid duplicates.

assertions.description: Must check existing issues before posting
Must mention duplicate checking in its reasoning

tests.name: picks-highest-priority-issue
tests.prompt: Pick up the highest priority agent:ready issue, implement it, and open a pull request.

assertions.description: Must query the issue list
Must filter by agent:ready label
Must create an isolated worktree
Must open a pull request

tests.name: creates-pr-with-correct-structure
tests.prompt: Implement issue <ISSUE_N> and open a pull request.

assertions.description: Must create a pull request
PR body must reference the issue with Closes #N

tests.name: detects-file-overlap-conflicts
tests.prompt: Analyze the agent:ready issues for merge conflicts. Two issues both modify SKILL.md description frontmatter.

assertions.description: Must identify conflicts between overlapping issues
Must recommend serialization for conflicting issues

tests.name: clears-non-conflicting-issues
tests.prompt: Analyze these agent:ready issues: one consolidates ENV.md files, another creates a new eval suite. Do they conflict?

assertions.description: Must identify that non-overlapping issues can run in parallel

tests.name: audits-pr-and-posts-comment
tests.prompt: Audit the open PRs for test coverage gaps.

assertions.description: Must inspect open PRs
Must post a structured coverage comment on the PR

tests.name: confirms-sufficient-coverage
tests.prompt: Audit PR <PR_N> for test coverage. The changes are documentation-only (ENV.md refactoring).

assertions.description: Must recognize that doc-only changes may not need tests

tests.name: checks-quality-finisher-reports
tests.prompt: Verify and merge the sprint PRs: <PR_N>, <PR_M>.

assertions.description: Must check for Quality Finisher reports before proceeding
Must NEVER push the ephemeral verify branch to remote

tests.name: creates-ephemeral-verify-branch
tests.prompt: Batch-verify the sprint PRs by merging them locally.

assertions.description: Must create a local verify branch
Must merge PR branches into the verify branch
Must use squash-merge strategy for final merge to main

tests.name: spawns-rangers-in-parallel
tests.prompt: Run a full guild expedition on this repository.

assertions.description: Must spawn issue-ranger agents
Must include ranger scouting phase

tests.name: runs-raid-commander-before-slayers
tests.prompt: Run a full sprint. Skip the ranger phase — issues are already posted.

assertions.description: Must run Raid Commander analysis before spawning Slayers
Must present conflict analysis from Raid Commander
